name: @blackbelt-technology/frontend-mockup-loop
description_en: Pi extension + skill for a ground→contract→mockup→test→fix→learn frontend design loop. Ships a live mockup server tool, a Playwright breakpoint-screenshot tool, and a design-contract scaffolder. Works in any React/Tailwind/shadcn project.
description_zh: Pi 扩展 + 技能，用于前端设计循环：需求→合同→原型→测试→修复→学习。提供实时原型服务器工具、Playwright 断点截图工具和设计合同脚手架。适用于任何 React/Tailwind/shadcn 项目。
